current_state: Governance Hub initialized with Blueprint & State UI paradigm
Dynamic tenant routing implemented for data segregation
M-GRPO research artifact established in reference_vault
Strict AJV schema validation active on all state updates

reference_vault.purpose: Immutable RAG Knowledge Base for Build-Time Agents

chapters.title: The M-GRPO Revolution
chapters.content: The Yield Force engine is powered by Multi-Agent Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO). This ensures that every sub-agent in the operational squad remains aligned with the Sovereign's intent while maintaining extreme processing velocity.
key_breakthroughs: Hierarchical Credit Assignment: Precision reward distribution across agent squads.
Trajectory-Alignment Scheme: Preserving system stability during agent swaps.
Decoupled Pipelines: Independent evolution of governance and execution layers.

chapters.title: The 5-Zone Pipeline
chapters.content: Our infrastructure is partitioned into five distinct logical zones to ensure security, compliance, and deterministic outcomes.

zones.ZONE_3: The Agnostic Central Datastore (Source of Truth)

chapters.title: The Mathematical Anchor
chapters.content: Every action within the fortress is governed by the core reward function. This ensures that accuracy is the primary objective, while format compliance maintains the structural integrity of the machine-to-machine communication.

chapters.title: Multi-Tenant Commercial Logic
chapters.content: Handles commercial extraction and billing logic independent of operational execution.
sections: 17.1 The Commercial Injection: Ingests billing_type during Phase 0.
17.2 The Metadata-Only Push: Asymmetric Sync to Agency Hub.
17.3 The Kicker Bridge: Triggers billing events upon 'Verified' ledger status.

chapters.title: Zone 3 Data Architecture (The SQL Foundation)
chapters.content: Zone 3 is the immutable Source of Truth. The Universal Agnostic Schema is designed for Normalization-via-JSONB.
sections: 7.2 The Outcomes Ledger: Stores final verified results.
7.4 The Enthusiast Ledger: Logs granular data that builds brand advocacy.
7.5 Row Level Security (RLS): Enforces digital sovereignty at the database layer.

chapters.title: The Onboarding Cohort (The Factory Deep-Dive)
chapters.content: Build-time agents responsible for 'Digital Excavation.' They translate human intent into the SOUL configuration package.

agents.0: The Architect: Designs the data schema and safety templates.
agents.3: The Summarizer: Distills requirements into the System Prompt.

chapters.title: The Operational Squad (The Workforce Deep-Dive)
chapters.content: Persistent, execution-focused agents that live permanently within the 5-Zone Blueprint, synchronized to the M-GRPO reward function.

agents.2: The Sentinel: Enforces the 0.9/0.1 reward function on every action.
agents.3: The Bridge (Native Closer): Writes the final verified transaction to the Datastore.

chapters.title: The Zone 5 Strategic Governance Portal
chapters.content: The only window into the engine that truly matters for the executive, powered by a Direct Data Feed Bypass.
sections: Processed Intelligence View: High-level Yield snapshots, sentiment trends, and ROI metrics.
Raw Terminal View: Real-time, second-by-second 'Thought Stream' of the Liaison and Sentinel.

chapters.title: Strategic Recalibration (The Sliders)
chapters.content: Modify the M-GRPO reward functions in real-time without writing code. You are mathematically re-weighting the Sentinel's audit criteria.

sliders.0: Aggression: Increases outreach frequency and conversion speed.
sliders.2: Transparency: Increases the verbosity of the Raw Terminal View logs.
